query: Lower the ControlNet strength to 0.5 so the text prompt has more influence over the final image than the control image edges.

desired.outcome: The ControlNet guidance is reduced, allowing the text prompt to drive the composition while still loosely following the input structure.
desired.quality: All ControlNet connections remain intact; the strength parameter (or equivalent conditioning scale) is correctly updated; no other nodes or parameters are broken.

_tags.author_rationale: A precise, testable parameter edit that forces the agent to locate the exact node and value, avoiding generic 'improve quality' phrasing.
